name: Ornamental Horseshoe
descs:
Turn Start: apply 2 [Breath] Potency to 1 random ally without [Breath].

When all allies have [Breath] Potency, apply 1 [Breath] Count to all allies instead.

Turn Start: apply 3 [Breath] Potency to a random ally without [Breath] Potency.

When all allies have [Breath], apply 2 [Breath] Count to all allies instead.

Turn Start: apply 3 [Breath] Potency to 2 random allies without [Breath] Potency.

When all allies have [Breath], apply 3 [Breath] Count to all allies instead.
